code:
value BankAccount
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ account: BankAccount, _ amount: Int) -> BankAccount
  account.copy(balance: account.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ account: BankAccount, _ amount: Int) -> Result<BankAccount, String>
  if amount > account.balance
    Err("overdraft")
  else
    Ok(account.copy(balance: account.balance - amount))
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let acct0 = BankAccount(balance: 100)
  let acct1 = deposit(acct0, 50)
  let acct2 = match withdraw(acct1, 30)
  when Ok(a)
    a
  when Err(_)
    acct1
  end
  let last = withdraw(acct2, 500)
  let final_balance = acct2.balance
  let last_status = match last
  when Ok(_)
    "ok"
  when Err(_)
    "overdraft"
  end
  println("final_balance=#{final_balance}")
  println("last_status=#{last_status}")
end
